response:
Maria buys granola bars that come in boxes of 12 bars per box, with each bar containing 90 calories.  
If Maria has already eaten 3 bars, the remaining bars in the box are 12 - 3 = 9 bars.  
The remaining calories in the box are 9 bars × 90 calories/bar = 810 calories.  
The response starts and ends with the word "calories".

calories
